channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Why Open-Source Intelligence Is a Powerful Weapon Against Fentanyl
item.description: The fentanyl crisis is one of the most urgent public health and national security concerns facing the United States. Combatting it will require the know-how and access of industry partners working with the authorities and resources of the U.S. government and its allies.

item.title: Toward a Mature AI Economy: Policy Priorities for the Road Ahead
item.description: To encourage long-term innovative uses of AI that go beyond simple process improvements, policymakers should focus beyond the tech industry, provide clarity on data privacy, and support foundational training on AI.

item.title: Governing Antarctica in 2026
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Senior Associate Bill Muntean gives an overview of the agenda and issues for the upcoming Antarctic Treaty Consultative Meeting.

item.title: Mona Yacoubian in Foreign Policy: Lebanon’s Moment of Reckoning
item.description: The Lebanese government faces a moment of reckoning, with Israel, with Hezbollah, and with the Lebanese people.
